title: Cert Warden per-run metrics artifact
description: JSON array with one record per DNS zone the warden evaluated. Produced by the warden, consumed by the monitor. Covered by SemVer: additive fields are a minor bump; renames/removals/semantic changes are a major bump.

action.description: What happened for the zone this run. not_delegated zones are excluded from the SLO.

kv_cert_name.description: Key Vault certificate object name (le-cert-<le-env>-<zone-dashed>-pfx); empty for not_delegated.

lifetime_fraction_remaining.description: Remaining lifetime fraction of the served cert; null when unknown (e.g. failed issuance with no cert). The monitor's SLO input.

days_to_expiry.description: Days until the served cert expires; null when unknown.

error.description: Error message for failed actions; empty otherwise.
